case_title: DOUGLAS WEINBERG VS. ROBERT DUFORT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00) SERVED AUG-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUFORT, LAURA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT LAURA DUFORT WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 506.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO LAURA DUFORT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEINBERG, DOUGLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUFORT, ROBERT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LAURA DUFORT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--SHE HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,462.76 FILED BY WEINBERG, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT DUFORT, ROBERT DUFORT, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
